common.checkConnection: Check your connection and try again.

placeholder.supabaseNote: This section will connect to real data with Supabase.

admin.title: Administration
admin.description: Members and roles, per-plant business configuration (replacement cost, headcount, risk thresholds), and audit log.

reports.title: Reports
reports.description: Weekly history, exportable reports (PDF/CSV), scheduled email digest, and tracking of intervention effectiveness (ROI).

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.description: Connectors for your ERP/HRIS (CSV/SFTP/API import), the XGBoost model pipeline, and outputs to Slack/Teams/email and webhooks.

dashboard.title: Workforce
dashboard.subtitle: {count, number} employees · each dot is a person · ranked by 30-day turnover risk
dashboard.mapSubtitle: Each dot is an employee. The highest-risk ones (top) stand out in warm tones; hover or click to open their profile.
dashboard.errorTitle: We could not load the plant status
dashboard.topHint: Click the ID to see their trend

dotField.mapAria: Map of {total, number} employees by turnover risk; {known} at known risk

line.title: Line {id}
line.subtitle: {count} employees at risk · shift {shift}
line.employeesHint: Filtered to medium-high and high risk
line.emptyLine: No medium-high risk employees on this line.

employee.errorTitle: We could not load the profile
employee.subtitle: Line {line} · shift {shift} · {tenure} days tenure
employee.radarSubtitle: Risk shape across six dimensions · visual summary
employee.driversSubtitle: SHAP contribution by factor · actionable detail
employee.trendSubtitle: Last 12 weeks · trend over the PK (employee_id, week_start)

modal.label: Retention recommendation · {ref}
modal.evidenceTitle: Evidence · why the model flagged them
modal.assignError: Could not assign the recommendation. Try again.

states.errorDefault: We could not load the data

routeError.title: Something went wrong in this view
routeError.detail: An unexpected error occurred. You can retry.
